title: ElNet VA Meter | Control Applications
content_html:
ElNet VA General electrical measurements

Three-phase multimeter.
Allows three-phase current display
Allows three-phase voltage display
Measurement accuracy 0.5%.
Sophisticated display screen with illuminated LCD backlight.
Adaptation to all types of current transformers.
Easy and simple installation and wiring.
